summary: Iteration 22 - Notification System and Payment Tracking Testing Complete. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). All new notification and payment endpoints fully functional: booking returns payment_id, GET /notifications returns user's notifications sorted by created_at desc, GET /notifications/unread-count returns count, POST /notifications/{id}/read marks as read. Full flow tested: create lesson -> book (generates booking_confirmed notification + payment_id) -> start (generates group_lesson_started notification for booked users). Security verified: notifications endpoint only returns current user's notifications.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request (backend only testing)

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/group-lessons/{id}/book - VERIFIED: Returns payment_id alongside lesson_id and message
GET /api/notifications - VERIFIED: Returns user's notifications sorted by created_at descending
GET /api/notifications/unread-count - VERIFIED: Returns {count: int} object with unread count
POST /api/notifications/{id}/read - VERIFIED: Marks notification as read, unread count decreases
Notification structure - VERIFIED: Contains all required fields (id, user_id, type, title, message, data, read, created_at)
booking_confirmed notification - VERIFIED: Created when student books a lesson, contains lesson_id in data
group_lesson_started notification - VERIFIED: Created for each booked user when teacher starts lesson
SECURITY - VERIFIED: Notifications endpoint only returns current user's notifications (user_id filtering works)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests create TEST_ prefixed group lessons and notifications for each test case.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system fully tested and working. 4 new endpoints verified: GET /api/notifications (sorted by created_at desc), GET /api/notifications/unread-count, POST /api/notifications/{id}/read, plus booking returns payment_id. Notification types tested: 'booking_confirmed' (when student books) and 'group_lesson_started' (when teacher starts). Security verified - users only see their own notifications.
mocked_api_note: Payment system is MOCKED (stored in group_lesson_payments collection). Daily.co integration is REAL.
